It belongs to the genus Mildbraedia, which is a group of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Africa. intro: Mildbraedia fallax, also known as Wild Ginger or African Ginger, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Zingiberaceae. The health benefits of Mildbraedia fallax include its use in traditional medicine to alleviate digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory properties.
